candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; equals Total Revenue numerically and is clearly top-line sales.
Explicit total revenue line with same values as Operating revenue; included as alternate label in case of label changes over time.
Financial income, not operating revenue; should not be used for top-line sales.
Interest income, not operating revenue; should not be used for top-line sales.
Tax line, unrelated to revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet interest receivable; not revenue line item.

variables.notes: Total Revenue and Operating revenue are duplicate top-line sales; both included as priority list for robustness to label variation.

candidates.why: Labor costs likely part of operating cost of services but may also include overhead; less comprehensive than aggregate Operating expenses.
Main operating cost bucket directly associated with generating operating revenue; best proxy for cost of sales/COGS.
Component of operating expenses; may include more overhead-type costs and not the full direct cost base.
Net figure mixing operating income and expense; inappropriate as COGS because it nets revenue and costs.
Financing cost, not cost of goods sold.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Non Operating Income/(Expense), net
candidates.why: Balancing/non-operating; not production cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Financing element of leases, not operating COGS.
Accrued financing cost on balance sheet; not COGS.

variables.notes: Operating expenses is the primary aggregate of direct operating costs and is the best available proxy for COGS; component rows like Payroll Expenses are subsets and not used alone for COGS.

candidates.why: Main operating cost bucket but also used as COGS proxy; mixing it into SG&A would double-count COGS.
Likely contains miscellaneous operating overhead; suitable SG&A component when COGS is mapped to Operating expenses.
Clearly administrative overhead, a classic SG&A component.

variables.notes: Excluded Operating expenses from SG&A because it is used as COGS. Selected overhead-like components Other Operating Expense and Administrative Cost as SG&A components.
No line item related to research and development appears in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet; XRD is treated as zero.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line on income statement; best representation of financing costs.
Represents allocation of net income, not interest expense.
Represents allocation of net income, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental interest component of lease liabilities; secondary interest expense measure.
Equity attributable to minority holders, not interest expense.
Same as Non-Controlling Interests; equity, not interest expense.
Accrued but unpaid interest on balance sheet; useful fallback if income statement interest is missing.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list: main income statement interest expense first, then lease-related interest, then balance sheet accrued interest as fallback.

candidates.why: Component of equity, not the total equity attributable to owners; less appropriate than Shareholders' Equity - Total.
Another partial/component equity line; not clearly total owners’ equity.
Explicitly total equity attributable to shareholders (owners) and excludes Non-Controlling Interests; ideal for book equity (BE).
Includes both shareholders’ equity and Non-Controlling Interests; would double-count with MIB, so not preferred when a shareholders-only line exists.
Balancing/plug line, not a meaningful equity measure.
Balancing/plug line; not appropriate for BE.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing plug for the whole balance sheet, not equity itself.
Total of equity and liabilities; not book equity.

variables.notes: Shareholders' Equity - Total represents equity attributable to owners and excludes Non-Controlling Interests, matching the BE definition.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to non-controlling interests; not the balance sheet stock but confirms the presence of minorities.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary choice for minority interest (MIB).
Alternative label for same balance sheet minority interests; useful if label changes over time.
Income statement minority interest allocation; not the stock amount but consistent with presence of NCI.

variables.notes: Mapped to balance sheet minority equity: Non-Controlling Interests as primary, Minority Interest as alternate label. Income statement lines are flows and not used for MIB stock.
